name: Ham-Filled Mushroom Caps
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Dried red chili pepper, seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the ham, garlic, parsley, dried chili pepper, and olive oil.
2. Fill the mushroom caps with this mixture.
3. Arrange the filled caps in a baking dish (may be prepared ahead) and bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
(Champiños Rellenos de Jamón). From "Tapas: The Little Dishes of Spain" by Penelope Casas.
Fat grams per serving: Approximately
Cook Time: 15 minutes
